array_types.name: Output_Buffer
array_types.code: type Output_Buffer is array (Output_Buffer_Index range <>) of Output_Color;

array_types.name: Palette_Type
array_types.code: type Palette_Type is array (Color_Index) of Output_Color;

array_types.name: Tile
Tile_Array
array_types.code: type Tile_Array is array (Tile_Index range <>) of Tile;

array_types.name: Tile_Collisions
Tile_Collisions_Array
array_types.code:
type Tile_Collisions_Array is array (Tile_Index range <>)
  of Tile_Collisions;

record_types.name: Pix_Point
Pix_Rect

tagged_types.name: Layer_Type
tagged_types.code: type Layer_Type is abstract tagged limited private;

access_types.name: Palette_Ref
access_types.code: type Palette_Ref is access constant Palette_Type;

access_types.name: Push_Pixels_Proc
access_types.code:
type Push_Pixels_Proc is
  access procedure (Buffer : Output_Buffer);

access_types.name: Set_Drawing_Area_Proc
access_types.code: type Set_Drawing_Area_Proc is access procedure (Area : Pix_Rect);

access_types.name: Tile_Array_Ref
access_types.code: type Tile_Array_Ref is access constant Tile_Array;

access_types.name: Tile_Collisions_Array_Ref
access_types.code: type Tile_Collisions_Array_Ref is access constant Tile_Collisions_Array;

subprograms.name: Add
subprograms.code:
procedure Add (L        : not null Layer.Ref;
               Priority : Layer_Priority)

subprograms.name: Enable_Collisions
subprograms.code:
procedure Enable_Collisions (This   : in out Layer_Type;
                             Enable : Boolean := True)

subprograms.name: Move
subprograms.code:
procedure Move (This : in out Layer_Type;
                Pt   : Pix_Point)

subprograms.name: Render_All
Render_Dirty
Render_Window
